---
description: "Run SEO analysis on the website: meta tags, schema markup, content optimization, local SEO"
agent: "seo-specialist"
---
Perform a comprehensive SEO audit for the {{PROJECT_NAME}} website:

## Analysis Areas

### 1. On-Page SEO
- Review meta titles and descriptions for all pages
- Check H1/H2/H3 hierarchy
- Analyze keyword density for target terms
- Review image alt text and optimization

### 2. Technical SEO
- Check robots.txt and sitemap.xml
- Verify canonical URLs
- Review URL structure
- Check mobile responsiveness
- Analyze page speed (identify bottlenecks)

### 3. Local SEO
- Review Google Business Profile optimization
- Check NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency
- Verify local schema markup (LocalBusiness JSON-LD)
- Review local keyword targeting

### 4. Content Strategy
- Analyze existing content for target keywords
- Identify content gaps
- Recommend new content topics
- Provide bilingual (EN/ES) content suggestions

### 5. Competitive Analysis
- Key competitors for primary keywords
- Differentiation opportunities
- Link building suggestions
